data.title: Large Transfer of TON Tokens Observed from Kiln to Anonymous Address
data.description: A significant transfer of TON tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 00:57, a total of 3,921,659.4 TON tokens were moved from Kiln to an anonymous address starting with EQAf4vJc2T. The transaction highlights ongoing activity within the TON network.

data.title: Polymarket's betting odds on the Colombian presidential election are neck and neck, with the top two candidates having similar probabilities.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in Polymarket's predictions for the Colombian presidential election, the odds for the leading candidates have narrowed further today, with the difference in their chances of winning now less than 3%, rapidly squeezing their lead. Specifically, Iván Cepeda Castro's probability of winning has continued to decline to 40%, while Paloma Valencia's has risen to 37.8%. Iván Cepeda Castro is a left-wing Colombian senator and potential presidential candidate, a human rights politician who advocates for peace negotiations and social reforms. Paloma Valencia is a right-wing Colombian senator and potential presidential candidate, a representative of the "Uribe faction," who advocates for a hardline security and conservative policy approach. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before they are priced in.

data.title: Iran Arrests Man for Providing Unrestricted Internet Access via Starlink
data.description: Iranian authorities have arrested a 37-year-old man for offering unrestricted internet access using Starlink equipment in Fars Province. According to Jin10, this development comes as Iran faces nearly three weeks of widespread internet shutdowns, following the onset of conflict. The Iranian government has implemented nationwide internet restrictions, and the country is reportedly nearing a complete network disruption, as noted by internet monitoring organization NetBlocks.

data.title: U.S. Oil Rig Count Decreases by 75 Compared to Last Year
data.description: The number of oil drilling rigs in the United States has decreased by 75 compared to the same period last year. According to Jin10, this decline reflects ongoing adjustments in the energy sector. The reduction in active rigs may impact future oil production levels and market dynamics. Industry analysts are closely monitoring these changes to assess their potential effects on the global oil market.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 72,000 USDT with a 2.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2026, 16:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 72,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 72,003.351563 USDT, with a narrowed 2.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Iraqi Militia Offers Reward for Information on U.S. Military Personnel
data.description: On March 13, local time, the Iraqi militia group 'Islamic Resistance' issued a statement seeking information from all Iraqi citizens and foreign nationals within Iraq regarding U.S. military and intelligence personnel. According to Jin10, the group announced a reward of 150 million Iraqi dinars for accurate intelligence that could lead to the capture or elimination of U.S. military officials or intelligence leaders. Earlier that day, the 'Islamic Resistance' claimed responsibility for 31 drone and rocket attacks on U.S. targets in Iraq and surrounding areas. Since February 28, the group has conducted a total of 335 attacks.

data.title: New York Lawmaker Proposes Estate Tax Increase
data.description: New York Assemblyman Zohran Mamdani has introduced a proposal to significantly increase the state's estate tax. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the plan suggests raising the tax rate to 50% and lowering the threshold to $750,000 from the current level of over $7 million. This proposal aims to address wealth inequality and generate additional revenue for the state. The suggested changes would mark a substantial shift in New York's tax policy, potentially impacting many residents. The proposal is expected to spark debate among lawmakers and the public as discussions unfold.

data.title: Pointed Game Challenges Players to Achieve Perfect Score
data.description: The latest edition of the game Pointed has seen only 35 players achieve a perfect score. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenge for players to join the exclusive 190-point club. The game continues to attract participants eager to test their skills and reach this milestone.

data.title: Marathon Digital Sells 298 BTC Amid Market Adjustments
data.description: Marathon Digital Holdings has reportedly sold 298 Bitcoin, according to NS3.AI. This move comes as the company adjusts its strategy in response to current market conditions. Marathon Digital, known for its significant presence in the cryptocurrency mining sector, has been actively managing its Bitcoin holdings to optimize its financial position. The sale reflects a broader trend among crypto companies seeking to balance their portfolios amid fluctuating market dynamics. As the industry continues to evolve, firms like Marathon Digital are making strategic decisions to navigate the complexities of the cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: STOCKS | Wall Street Explores Bond Alternatives Amid Disappointing Hedges
data.description:
Wall Street is actively seeking alternatives to traditional bonds as hedges fail to meet expectations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the shift in investment strategies due to the underperformance of conventional bond hedges. Investors are increasingly looking for new ways to protect their portfolios, as the usual methods are not delivering the desired results.

The financial sector is exploring various options, including equities and commodities, to provide better returns and risk management. This change comes as bond yields remain low, prompting investors to reconsider their strategies. The search for effective hedging solutions is crucial in the current economic climate, where volatility and uncertainty are prevalent.

Market analysts suggest that diversifying investments could offer more stability and potential growth. The exploration of alternatives is gaining traction, with experts advocating for a broader approach to portfolio management. As traditional hedges continue to disappoint, the focus is shifting towards innovative solutions that can adapt to the evolving market conditions.

The move towards alternative investments reflects a growing need for flexibility and resilience in financial planning. Investors are urged to stay informed and consider various options to safeguard their assets in an unpredictable market environment. The ongoing search for effective hedging strategies underscores the importance of adaptability in achieving long-term financial goals.

data.title: Oil Price Surge Raises Questions on Energy Transition
data.description: The recent spike in oil prices has sparked discussions about its impact on the global energy transition. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the varied interpretations and implications of this development. As oil prices rise, stakeholders are examining how this might influence efforts to shift towards renewable energy sources. The increase presents both challenges and opportunities for the energy sector, with some viewing it as a potential setback for green initiatives, while others see it as a catalyst for accelerating the transition. The situation remains complex, with diverse perspectives on the future of energy policy and sustainability.

data.title: Investing in Oil Amid Gulf Conflict: Strategies and Risks
data.description:
Investing in oil has always been fraught with risks, even during times of peace. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the complexities and challenges that come with investing in this volatile commodity, especially now with the ongoing conflict in the Gulf region.

The geopolitical tensions in the Gulf have added layers of uncertainty to the oil market, affecting prices and investor sentiment. Experts suggest that understanding the dynamics of supply and demand, as well as geopolitical influences, is crucial for making informed investment decisions.

Investors are advised to consider various strategies, such as diversifying their portfolios and staying informed about global events that could impact oil prices. Additionally, the importance of monitoring market trends and being prepared for sudden shifts in the market is emphasized.

While the potential for high returns exists, the risks associated with oil investments are significant. The current situation in the Gulf serves as a reminder of the unpredictable nature of the commodity markets and the need for careful planning and risk management.

As the conflict continues to unfold, investors must remain vigilant and adaptable to navigate the complexities of investing in oil during such turbulent times.

data.title: TRUMP Token Sees Price Surge Following Gala Event Announcement
data.description: A previously inactive wallet made a significant purchase of over $7 million worth of TRUMP tokens shortly after the token team announced a second gala event for top holders. According to NS3.AI, this activity led to a rebound in TRUMP's price from approximately $2.71 to $4.50, before settling around $3.90. As a result, the wallet's position increased by about $2.47 million at the time of publication.

data.title: Bank of America analysts: A further decline in the S&P 500 could trigger a policy response from the White House or the Federal Reserve.
data.description: Bank of America analyst Michael Hartnett warned that a further decline in the S&P 500—to around 6600 points, only 1% below recent levels—could trigger a policy response from the White House or the Federal Reserve. (Jinshi)

data.title: MoonPay Integrates Ledger Hardware Wallet for Enhanced Security
data.description: MoonPay has announced the integration of Ledger hardware wallet signing into its CLI wallet, which is utilized by MoonPay Agents. According to NS3.AI, this move aims to minimize the exposure of private keys in autonomous cryptocurrency trading. Users can now verify and sign transactions generated by agents directly on a Ledger device, ensuring that private keys remain securely within the hardware signer. This development is expected to enhance security measures for users engaging in crypto transactions through MoonPay's platform.

data.title: U.S. Intensifies Strikes on Iran Amid Escalating Conflict
data.description: The United States has increased its military strikes on Iran to unprecedented levels, as tensions between the two nations continue to rise. Bloomberg posted on X that the conflict, now reaching its two-week mark, is causing disruptions in energy flows and impacting global financial markets. Both sides have issued threats to escalate the situation further, raising concerns about the potential for broader regional instability. The ongoing hostilities are contributing to volatility in the markets, with investors closely monitoring developments. The situation remains fluid, with diplomatic efforts yet to yield a resolution.

data.title: Los Angeles Plans Electric Bus Fleet for Climate-Friendly Summer Games
data.description: Los Angeles is gearing up for a climate-conscious and 'transit-first' approach to the upcoming Summer Games by heavily investing in electric buses. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the city's commitment to reducing its carbon footprint and enhancing public transportation infrastructure. The initiative aims to align with global sustainability goals and provide efficient transit solutions for the influx of visitors expected during the event. By prioritizing electric buses, Los Angeles seeks to set a precedent for environmentally responsible urban planning in major international events.

data.title: Iran Conflict Alters Russian Oil Dynamics as Asian Buyers Accelerate Purchases
data.description: Before the outbreak of the Iran conflict, Russian oil was heavily stockpiled on offshore tankers, typically sold at significantly low prices. According to Jin10, the situation shifted rapidly as the conflict led to restrictions on non-sanctioned oil supplies. Analysts from vessel tracking data provider Kpler estimate that prior to the commencement of the 'Epic Fury Operation,' approximately 135 million barrels of Russian oil were stored at sea. By Friday, this figure had decreased to 121 million barrels, indicating a swift acquisition by Asian buyers who transported the oil onshore. While the exact amount of oil sold remains unclear, Kpler's senior crude oil analyst, Naveen Das, estimates that over 4 million barrels of Russian oil are being unloaded at ports daily this month.

data.title: Expert Warns of Potential Policy Response if S&P 500 Declines Further
data.description: Bank of America analyst Michael Hartnett has issued a warning regarding the S&P 500 index. According to Jin10, Hartnett suggests that if the index continues to fall, reaching around 6,600 points—approximately 1% lower than its recent level—it could trigger a policy response from either the White House or the Federal Reserve. This potential reaction underscores the sensitivity of economic policymakers to significant market movements, highlighting the importance of monitoring the index's performance closely.

data.title: Economic Team for Senator Flávio Bolsonaro Remains Uncertain
data.description: The list of potential candidates for the economic team of Senator Flávio Bolsonaro is expanding, yet a leader has not been determined. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing uncertainty surrounding the leadership selection. The process continues as more names are considered, but a final decision has yet to be made.
